input.command:
python3 -c "
import csv
with open('/lustre/fast/fast/sgoel/forecasting/current_sim/final_runs_v37/opencode_aljazeeraQ12026v37_qwen36plus/26-05-02-00-01-06/agents/minimalHarness_qwen_qwen36-plus_001/workspace/market.csv') as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader(f)
    rows = list(reader)

for r in rows:
    rd = r.get('resolution_date','').strip()
    if rd and rd == '2026-02-02':
        print(f'QID: {r[\"qid\"]}')
        print(f'Title: {r[\"title\"]}')
        print(f'Background: {r[\"background\"][:300] if r[\"background\"] else \"N/A\"}')
        print('---')
"

---

Background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-27. Before the NBA trade deadline, teams can make deals that send players in both directions, sometimes involving star guards and major roster changes.
---
QID: 243685
Title: What will Myanmar's new five-member panel be called when it is established by March 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-01. Myanmar's authorities are expected to announce new state bodies as part of a post-election political arrangement. One planned body is a five-member panel that will receive an official name once it is created.
---
QID: 955662
Title: Which Brazilian state will authorities identify as the site of a bus crash that kills at least 16 people by February 4, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-19. Large religious gatherings in northeastern Brazil can lead to heavy bus travel on rural roads. If a major crash involving people returning from one of these gatherings occurs in early February 2026, the state where it happens will be a key fact.
---
QID: 453736
Title: Who will Al Jazeera Arabic report has been killed in Libya by February 3, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-19. Al Jazeera Arabic is a major regional news outlet that covers political and security developments in the Middle East and North Africa.
---
QID: 976004
Title: Where will forensic experts be sent in the Libyan killing probe announced by 10 February 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-19. In a homicide investigation, authorities may send forensic specialists to the place where the shooting happened. This question asks for the location later named by Libyan authorities.
---
QID: 995305
Title: Which city will be reported by 3 February 2026 as the location of a huge fire at a market?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-26. Sudden emergencies in crowded business districts can disrupt transport, commerce, and daily life. This question asks which city will later be identified in news reporting as the location of a major market incident.
